confirm_delete_deck: Do you want to delete this deck ?
whitespace_error: must not be only white space
confirm_delete_flashcard: Do you want to delete this flashcard?
congratulations_completed: Congratulations, you have completed all the flashcards!
workspace_flashcard_desc: Manage and review your workspace flashcard decks
create_first_deck: Create your first flashcard deck to start learning
import.title: Import Flashcards
import.selectFile: Click to select file or drag and drop
import.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload CSV or JSON file.
import.fileReadError: Failed to read file. Please try again.
import.csvEmpty: CSV file is empty. Please provide at least one flashcard.
import.noValidFlashcards: No valid flashcards found in CSV file.
import.jsonInvalidStructure: Invalid JSON structure. Must contain 'deck' and 'flashcards' fields.
import.jsonNoFlashcards: No flashcards found in JSON file.
import.jsonInvalidCard: Invalid flashcard at position {{index}}. Must contain 'front' and 'back' fields.
import.note1: CSV: First row is header, subsequent rows contain front and back columns
import.note2: JSON: Must have 'deck' object with 'title' and 'flashcards' array
import.note3: Each flashcard must have 'front' and 'back' fields
export.title: Export Flashcards
export.note1: Your flashcards will be exported with all content
export.note2: You can import them later into any platform
pdf.title: Generate from PDF
pdf.selectFile: Click to select PDF or drag and drop
pdf.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please upload a PDF file.
pdf.selectFileWarning: Please select a PDF file first.
pdf.invalidNumFlashcards: Number of flashcards must be between 1 and 100.
pdf.error: An error occurred during PDF processing.
pdf.note1: Upload a PDF file and AI will analyze the content
pdf.note2: Flashcards will be automatically generated from the PDF
pdf.note3: You can edit them after generation
